design_philosophy.vibe: Objective, rigid, functional. The 'Control Room' for support engineers.
rules: Color is Function Only. 95% of the UI should be monochrome. Color exists only to guide action or indicate status (Error, Warning, Active).
Expose the grid. Use 1px sharp borders to separate content instead of whitespace and shadows.
Density is critical. Optimize for scanning massive amounts of data without scrolling endlessly.
No soft corners. Use sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm) to reinforce the technical/systematic feel.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
rules: Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-col dense layouts.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-4 or p-6) to prevent text collision.
Expose the skeleton. Container uses border-collapse layout.
No shadows. Reliance purely on 1px solid lines for structural hierarchy.
Interactive elements have sharp 1px borders (border-black/20) and a hard background fill on hover.

table.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500 bg-zinc-50 border-b border-zinc-200

Upload_Report.layout: Split screen or centered massive dropzone. Use the abstract geometric generated image as a half-screen background or hero visual.
Upload_Report.components: Massive File Upload Dropzone (dashed border-zinc-300, bg-zinc-50 hover:bg-zinc-100). Primary CTA.

Cluster_Overview.layout: Dense top-level metrics (Nodes, Storage, Health). Node Map visualization using grid-cols-auto.
Cluster_Overview.components: Metric Cards (Card component, big font-mono numbers). Status Badges.

Node_Health.layout: Grid of nodes showing CPU/RAM/Disk bars.
Node_Health.components: Progress bars (stark, flat colors without gradients). Use Recharts for tiny sparklines.

Workload_Queries.components: Shadcn Table. Use JetBrains Mono for the query text. Truncate long queries with hover tooltip.

Log_Explorer.layout: Classic IDE/Terminal layout. Left sidebar for filters (Severity, Node), main area for log tail.
Log_Explorer.components: Search Input (full width). Log List (virtualized if possible, strict font-mono, syntax highlighting colors for ERROR/WARN/INFO).

Recommendations.components: Cards with left border color-coded by severity (e.g., border-l-4 border-[#FF3B30]). Action buttons.

app_logo.description: Stark minimalist technical node icon, geometric flat design. Use in the header navbar next to 'Diagnostics'.

upload_hero.description: Minimalist Swiss style abstract geometric composition. Use as the background or side-panel image on the initial 'Upload Diagnostic Report' landing page.

rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Convention: kebab-case, role-based. Examples: data-testid='upload-report-button', data-testid='node-health-card-node-1', data-testid='log-search-input'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Control Room' dense grid design. Do not add unnecessary padding or rounded corners. Everything must feel like a precision instrument.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Chivo' for Headings, 'IBM Plex Sans' for Body, and 'JetBrains Mono' for all data, logs, and metrics.
Use standard HTML divs and Shadcn UI components configured heavily towards a flat, stark, cardless design.
All media URLs provided in this JSON MUST be used. Do not use placeholder images.
Ensure the Log Explorer implements a strict monospace layout for log lines, heavily color-coding 'ERROR' in Signal Red (#FF3B30) and 'WARN' in Warning Yellow (#FFCC00).
